title: Qdrant payload — archive_records
description: Vector index of archive-DB information_object rows (the AtoM-side production AHG demo / staging instance). One point per IO. Same schema shape as anc_records but `database` is fixed to 'archive'. Hosted at http://localhost:6333/collections/archive_records. Issue #23.

database.description: Source MySQL database. Always 'archive' for the AHG-demo collection.

title.description: information_object_i18n.title (en culture) — embedded into the vector.

has_scope.description: Whether scope_and_content was non-empty at embedding time.

has_transcript.description: Whether an OCR/AI transcript was available at embedding time.

x-collection.name: archive_records
consumers: AhgSearch\Services\VectorSearchService — when ahg_settings.semantic_qdrant_collection is set to 'archive_records'
x-collection.notes: Smaller corpus (~693 points). Used for parity testing against the larger anc_records collection. Switch via ahg_settings.semantic_qdrant_collection.
